item.title: YouTube Resources
item.description:
Channels

  • Asset Yogi

  • Value Research

  • kipkay

item.title: Bookmarks
item.description:
This page is now an index. The old mixed bookmark dump has been split into smaller resource pages so each list is easier to scan.

Resource Collections

  • Finance Links
  • Technical Reference Links
  • Learning and Science Resources
  • Personal Utility Resources
  • YouTube Resources

item.title: Learning and Science Resources
item.description:
Space

  • Space News
  • Must-see Space Documentaries
  • Galaxy Zoo
  • Milky Way Viewer

Science and Exploration

  • GeographyIQ
  • Astronomy Picture of the Day Archive
  • Science Maps - Draw and Share Maps
  • Live Science
  • Top Documentary Films

General Learning

  • Preceden - Create Timelines
  • Console Living Room
  • The Art of Manliness
  • Best books for preparing MPPSC
  • Facts about India many Indians are unaware of
  • Rare natural phenomena on Earth

item.title: Technical Reference Links
item.description:
